oneOf.description: Present only when status is FAILED for a bulk task. Contains information about the individual errors in the bulk task.
Present only when status is FAILED for a bulk task. Contains information about the individual errors in the bulk task.

message.description: Present only when status is FAILED. Contains information about the error.

response.description: Present only when status is SUCCEEDED. response can be empty if there is no data to be returned.

status.description: The current state of the task.
